verbatim_quote: And this is the first time that a lot of what we teach in YC is gonna be on the record. So we've invited some of our best speakers to come and give the same talks they give at YC.
gloss: [PREDICTION] And this is the first time that a lot of what we teach in YC is gonna be on the record. So we've invited some of our best speakers to come and give the same talks they give at YC.
